prompt: Conceptual abstract art of Neural entropy swarm made of shattered diamond aerosols. Explosion of pulsing ion-fields creating a corona effect. Technical: low angle heroic shot, cinematic lighting, ray-traced reflections, high fidelity masterpiece.
